query: color banding posterized gradient sky digital artifact
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / color_inconsistency — color banding in skies, posterization artifacts

response.objective_caption: A vast skyscape dominated by layered cloud formations ranging from wispy high-altitude clouds to dense, billowing cumulus masses. Warm light filters through breaks in the cloud cover, creating illuminated patches amid cooler gray and blue tones. A dark silhouette of distant land stretches across the lower edge of the frame beneath the expansive cloud canopy.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A skyscape conveying atmospheric distress, where dense cloud formations are suffused with a sickly color cast of unsettling greenish-blue and jaundiced yellow tones. The scene exhibits clashing disharmony and color inconsistency, with toxic teal shadows, warm orange highlights, and bruised purple-gray masses breaking tonal coherence across the frame. The oppressive, brooding canopy looms above a dark horizon, its mixed color temperatures and aggressively unbalanced palette evoking unease and environmental contamination.
